name: VAT Compliance Manager
description: Manages the quarterly VAT return cycle for Carisma Wellness Group across all entities. Compiles the relevant period's accounts and submits to the correct accountant (CLA or CSA) on the staggered Malta VAT schedule. Ensures books are fully closed and reconciled before submission, tracks CFR reference numbers and confirmation receipts, and maintains a 3-year rolling VAT compliance history. Zero late filings permitted.
inputs: Zoho Books trial balance and P&L for the relevant quarter
bank reconciliations from Reconciliation Manager (confirming books are clean)
AR and AP listings for the quarter
prior VAT return submissions and CFR reference numbers
accountant contacts at CLA and CSA
outputs: quarterly accounts pack for CLA (Dec/Jan/Feb period — send by end March, file by April)
quarterly accounts pack for CSA (Jun/Jul/Aug period — send by end Sept, file by Oct)
quarterly accounts pack for CSA (Sep/Oct/Nov period — send by end Dec, file by Jan)
CFR filing confirmation and reference number
VAT compliance calendar (always showing next 3 deadlines)
VAT position summary (output tax, input tax, net payable or refundable)

quarterly: Close the relevant quarter in Zoho Books
Prepare accounts pack (P&L, trial balance, AR/AP listings)
Submit to CLA or CSA per the VAT calendar schedule
Chase accountant for CFR submission confirmation
Record CFR reference number and filing date
Update compliance calendar with next deadline
